record.field: Water is delivered directly to the root zone through a network of valves, pipes, tubing, and emitters. Highly efficient.
Soil-free cultivation where plants are grown in nutrient-rich water solutions. Used in controlled environment agriculture.
Water is distributed through a system of pipes and sprinkler heads that spray water over the crop area.
Nutrient Film Technique — a thin film of nutrient solution flows continuously over the roots in shallow channels.
The field is flooded with water and allowed to drain or percolate. Traditional method used for rice and similar crops.
